programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.desc: A convicted thief continues his stealing ways inside the jail; a former law enforcement officer turned meth addict serves time with and grows closer to her dealer; a man gets arrested for allegedly threatening the sheriff.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: An inmate with incredible artistic abilities is charged in tragic crime; another inmate's seeming obsession with jail food causes problems; an unconventional marriage ends violently.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Pendleton Juvenile is the last stop in Indiana for young offenders who have committed serious crimes; the staff there must always be prepared for the unexpected, and is determined to rehabilitate impulsive teens who are often angry and violent.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A maximum-security prison is responsible for educating and rehabilitating teenage gang members, sex offenders and juveniles with mental health issues; inside the razor wire fences, anything can happen, and some days are more chaotic than others.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: With over 2,000 inmates, the Wabash Valley Correctional Facility has a larger population and more acreage than the small town in which it's located; after a decade in confinement, one of Indiana's most infamous inmates moves to general population.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The killer of a corrections officer fights to be freed from 16 years of solitary confinement, and boyhood friends struggle to parent their kids from behind prison walls; but one, cut-off from visits with his son, is on a razor's edge.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: At Wichita's Sedgwick County Jail an inmate launches an attack on another, sending him to the emergency room; a detective must get to the bottom of it, while a pastor hopes to get to the heart of it.

programme.title: Death Note: Selection

programme.title: Death Note: Scorn
programme.desc: Light pretends to investigate Kiyomi.

programme.desc: Aizawa figures out what's going on and tells Near, who already knows about the notes.

programme.title: Death Note: Malice
programme.desc: Light gives Kiyomi the order to finish off Near.

programme.title: Death Note: 1.28
programme.desc: Near, along with the SPK, meets Light and the task force at a warehouse for the final showdown.

programme.title: Death Note: New World
programme.desc: Though Mikami has written all the investigators' names in the Death Note, a minute passes and everyone is still alive.

programme.title: Death Note: Rebirth
programme.desc: Brilliant but bored high school student Light Yagami suddenly finds himself holding the power of life and death in his hand, the power of the Death Note.

programme.title: Death Note: Confrontation
programme.desc: While the world's criminals continue to drop dead, L meets by computer with representatives from various nations.

programme.title: Death Note: Dealings
programme.desc: Ryuk, the Shinigami, or god of death, who dropped the Death Note into the human world, warns Light that someone is on his trail.

programme.title: Death Note: Pursuit
programme.desc: Light, now known to the world as Kira, tests the Death Note to understand the scope of its powers by killing off six convicts in various ways.

programme.title: Death Note: Tactics
programme.desc: Soichiro Yagami demands to meet with L in person when he finds out that L has secretly brought FBI agents into Japan.

programme.title: Death Note: Unraveling
programme.desc: Light meets a woman at the Police Department with an urgent message for the Kira task force.

programme.title: Death Note: Overcast
programme.desc: Light uses the Death Note to try to get rid of the woman who could get him captured, and is shocked when it doesn't work.

programme.title: Death Note: Glare
programme.desc: L insists on setting up bugs and cameras in the homes of Chief Yagami and Deputy Director Kitamura.

programme.title: Death Note: Encounter
programme.desc: The murders continue, and L grows suspicious of Light's too perfect behavior and decides to investigate him on his own.

programme.title: Death Note: Doubt
programme.desc: L's suspicion of Light deepens, compelling him to invite Light into the investigation.

programme.title: Death Note: Assault
programme.desc: As predicted on the tapes sent to Sakura TV, news anchors and commentators who expressed doubt about Kira die one by one.

programme.title: Death Note: Love
programme.desc: With a second Kira now on the loose, L asks Light to join the task force and pose as the real Kira in order to catch the copycat.

programme.title: Death Note: Confession

programme.title: Death Note: Friend

programme.desc: Evidence turns up that points to Misa Amane as the second Kira.

programme.title: Death Note: Decision
programme.desc: Misa is in confinement, though her memories of the Death Note have been completely wiped away.

programme.title: Death Note: Execution
programme.desc: After fifty days of confinement the killings continue, and Misa and Light are released.

programme.title: Death Note: Ally
programme.desc: Though L is still suspicious, Light and Misa, their memories of being Kira wiped clean, return to headquarters….

programme.desc: Matsuda, the task force member assigned to watch Misa, is eager to distinguish himself.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de dos agentes encubiertos de la DEA y la desaparición de un tercero, el UAC se suma a la NSA para investigar si una red clandestina de drogas por Internet está involucrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que tal vez esté fascinado por inquietantes experimentos médicos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca al responsable de un asesino a sueldo que apunta a un Teniente Comandante de la Armada, mientras Abby descubre secretos familiares tras pruebas para donar un riñón.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un oficial de la guardia costera en un barco abandonado y encuentra a una familia libanesa buscando asilo en EE. UU. Mientras tanto, Tony y McGee buscan la pareja perfecta para Gibbs.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un caso de NCIS pasa de muerte accidental a asesinato cuando la evidencia revela que un teniente de la Armada murió por sobrehidratación forzada. Mientras tanto, Gibbs conoce a la nueva pareja sentimental de Ducky.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca respuestas cuando el actual esposo de la exesposa de Gibbs y Fornell es secuestrado de manera sospechosa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Compañeros
programme.desc: Mientras Danny y Maria escoltan drogas confiscadas, su convoy es atacado y Baez resulta herida. Danny busca al cartel responsable. Frank debe navegar lo personal y lo político.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Puentes ardientes
programme.desc: Danny y Baez tienen nuevos compañeros temporales. Jamie y Eddie planean robar la placa de un detective. Frank habla sobre igualdad y compromete su relación con la Arquidiócesis.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Perdonar y olvidar
programme.desc: Jamie defiende a un oficial acosado por testificar contra su pareja. Erin descubre que su amante podría ser su jefe en la fiscalía. Danny pide a Erin que acuse de asesinato a un hombre que disparó a una niña de 15 años que murió 8 años después.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Fuerza excesiva
programme.desc: Frank debe decidir si defiende a su hijo Danny, acusado de usar fuerza excesiva, o la reputación de la policía. Jamie se conecta con una doctora después de llevar a un indigente al hospital.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC ayuda a la hija periodista de Rossi, Joy (Amber Stevens West), a investigar la desaparición de una alumna de la universidad.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está persiguiendo a un sospechoso en Phoenix que está secuestrando víctimas con insomnio. Además, Hotch y García se enfrentan a la amenaza del grupo de sicarios clandestinos, llamados“La docena sucia.”

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de dos agentes encubiertos de la DEA y la desaparición de un tercero, el UAC se suma a la NSA para investigar si una red clandestina de drogas por Internet está involucrada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/29/2013. With a combination of cultures, New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. Go with Anthony Bourdain as he explores.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/06/2013. Home to chef Rene Redzepi of Noma, Copenhagen is known as the cultural center of Denmark. Anthony Bourdain explores its fantastic food and natural beauty.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/13/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Sicily, where he goes fishing for his supper and sets out to find a home-cooked meal.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/12/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores the "Interzone,” where artists like Burroughs, Bowles and the Rolling Stones sought escape from Western moral prohibitions.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/19/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants and post-war uncertainty, by examining the country through personal stories, food and music.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/02/2013. Bourdain and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, move from hip, modern Lima back in time into pre-Columbian Peru.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/09/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Congo, the setting of one of his favorite books, Conrad’s “Heart of Darkness.”

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/22/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Andalucia during Semana Santa, Holy Week, to visit longtime director Zach Zamboni, who currently lives in Granada.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A lengthy pursuit in Independence, MO goes off-road. Deputies chase a motorcyclist who claims he ran because he doesn't have a motorcycle endorsement. A man ingests fentanyl during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman rams a police car and begs Officers to take care of her dog. A man tells Officers he was just a passenger in a stolen Honda. A woman crashes her bicycle while trying to elude Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is tased twice after a car chase. His passenger resists and is also tased. A driver refuses to exit his truck in Florida. A woman claims the pills in her purse belong to her sister.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a bike refuses to stop and tries to hide a drug-filled backpack. A motorcyclist's attempt to flee is foiled by a big rig blocking the road. Meth is found in a center console during a stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female shoplifter flees in a stolen box truck and crashes into a retaining wall. A green Honda runs in Wichita. A female passenger in Florida admits to hiding drugs and a pipe in her intimate area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect makes a video call during a pursuit to apologize for relapsing. A burglar runs in circles in a vain attempt to elude Officers. A Sergeant finds a magnetic box full of meth and a hidden gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The driver of a car with a loud exhaust admits he panicked and ran. A woman caught riding a stolen moped claims she borrowed it. A man is caught with a tool for deactivating security tags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver speeds off when asked to step out of his truck. Deputies learn a man with a warrant for fentanyl is hiding in a backyard. A suspect steals a portable speaker after threatening an employee.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect with an ATF warrant runs from a traffic stop and gets tased. Drones help locate stolen motorcycles in Fort Wayne. A suspect leaves behind soggy footprints when he bails from a stolen car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A Deputy learns a new game from Spring Break coeds. Deputies respond to a shooting at the beach. A teenager is caught with alcohol. A woman tells Deputies she's being followed on the boardwalk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An intoxicated teen is found passed out in the surf late at night. Deputies find trespassers in a hot tub. A floating wallet is returned. The Marine Unit rescues a family thrown from jet skis.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An underaged spring breaker is caught with a 'blackout rage gallon' and issued a ticket. A zero-tolerance policy of no alcohol or glass containers on the beach is enforced in Pinellas County.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter dancing tourists on the Vegas Strip. An uncooperative spring breaker finds herself in cuffs. Surfers and lifeguards rescue swimmers from a riptide. A beachgoer lies about his age.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teen holding a beer walks up to a Deputy. A jet skier violates a no wake zone. Deputies cut a tangled bird free. A minor discards his can of alcohol and tells Deputies his mom will pay his citation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a knife resists as a hotel clerk cheers on Officers. A man protests the legality of a stop but finally admits why he argued with Officers. A passenger becomes emotional when meth is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A domestic call turns chaotic when a male suspect resists and his girlfriend interferes with his arrest. A truck with detachable red and blue lights is located during a call of a police impersonator.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers use a police SUV and a taser to stop a fleeing man with a knife. A hit-and-run suspect crashes into a gas station. An unlicensed driver has warrants in Greene County, Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect leads Officers on a car chase before running from a K9. A PIT maneuver is used to end a stolen vehicle pursuit. A man claims he has crazy eyes when a Deputy suspects him of driving high.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man flees from Deputies with the hood up on a pickup truck. A suspect bails from a stolen truck and pretends he wasn't driving. A drunk driver is caught after a hit-and-run at a dance hall.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist gives up after leading Fontana Officers on a wild pursuit. A K9 is used to track a felony shoplifting suspect who fled a traffic stop. A Stop Stick is used to end a chase in Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen TV hangs out of a van during a slow-speed pursuit. A woman bites her boyfriend during an argument in Florida. A man claims he received a stolen car from a relative.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female driving a stolen car spins out and runs from Officers in Missouri. A burglary in progress leads Officers to a suspect breaking windows at a church. An altered tag is discovered to be stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gives Officers a fake name when he's stopped on a bike with no lights. Officers initiate a high-risk traffic stop on a reckless driver. A man is caught walking in traffic on the Vegas Strip.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A lengthy pursuit in Independence, MO goes off-road. Deputies chase a motorcyclist who claims he ran because he doesn't have a motorcycle endorsement. A man ingests fentanyl during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman rams a police car and begs Officers to take care of her dog. A man tells Officers he was just a passenger in a stolen Honda. A woman crashes her bicycle while trying to elude Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is tased twice after a car chase. His passenger resists and is also tased. A driver refuses to exit his truck in Florida. A woman claims the pills in her purse belong to her sister.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a bike refuses to stop and tries to hide a drug-filled backpack. A motorcyclist's attempt to flee is foiled by a big rig blocking the road. Meth is found in a center console during a stop.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Things get personal when D.B. Russell is drawn into the investigation of the death of his son's basketball coach.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a reverend who was killed at the grave site of former CSI Warrick Brown.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five bodies are found in what appears to be a meteor site in the middle of the desert, CSI Finlay recognizes one of the casualties, prompting her to revisit her past.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team lends a hand to local law enforcement on the strip with several arrests until a John Doe is found in a car. Also, things become personal for Captain Brass when he discovers some facts about his daughter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five people are killed in a small plane crash a mile off the Vegas strip, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a prominent news anchor during a live broadcast.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs need to ace the case involving a rising tennis star. Meanwhile, the CSIs are surprised to hear Hodges is engaged to an Italian bombshell.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When CSI Mac Taylor decides to surprise his girlfriend in Vegas, he discovers she's missing and asks his friend D.B. Russell for help. Gary Sinise of CSI:NY guest stars.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a famous Cuban singer's sister who's in town as part of a U.S. tour.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara is a lead suspect in an investigation after a brief encounter with another man in which she was the last person to see him alive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When several prominent poker players lose their lives, the CSI team is called to investigate before more victims surface.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs join David Phillips at his high school reunion when he discovers the prom queen's been murdered.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs find a body near a forest reserve, they discover what might be a serial killer and his bizarre lair.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a triple homicide, Russell has to find a way to connect with a 6-year-old girl who was the sole survivor and witness.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos hombres son asesinados justo antes de exponer a una compañía de gas natural por envenenar a residentes en una ciudad agrícola. Ahora el equipo CSI debe descubrir quién es responsable de sus muertes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La caída fatal de un hombre desde el balcón de un hotel lanza al equipo de CSI a una investigación para determinar si su muerte fue suicidio o el resultado de un juego sucio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los CSI se propusieron localizar a un pedófilo sospechoso de asesinar a la esposa de un agente del FBI y secuestrar a sus hijos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una foto aparentemente falsa de una prostituta muerta aparece en línea, el equipo de CSI sigue una pista para encontrar a la mujer que fue asesinada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI vinculó un cuerpo con quemaduras graves a una posible ejecución por una silla eléctrica y a un legendario asesinato en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: U+000AUna noche llena de celebración termina con una explosión cuando el director de una fundación de becas para sordos es asesinado por un mortal coche bomba, lo que llevó a Sara a interrogar a los estudiantes y profesores de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una donación de segunda mano se vuelve espantosa cuando se encuentra un cadáver en una caja. Mientras tanto, la esposa de Langston hace una visita sorpresa al laboratorio criminalístico.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston testifica contra el famoso asesino de 'Dick y Jane', Nate Haskell. Mientras tanto, Nick recibe una llamada de un adolescente con problemas, Jason McCann, para advertirle del peligro inminente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo CSI está en alerta zombi cuando dos hombres inicialmente declarados muertos misteriosamente vuelven a la vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de un ex policía convicto, el equipo de CSI se topa con una lista en su celda de la prisión con los nombres de varias personas que creía que podrían haber sido el verdadero asesino de su esposa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una serie de muertes instigan una apuesta entre el equipo de CSI en cuanto a si han "golpeado para el ciclo," un homicidio, un suicidio, un accidente y una muerte natural en una sola noche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Sara se dirigen a Lady Heather en busca de ayuda para localizar al culpable responsable de herir a una mujer antes de que aparentemente fuera mutilada hasta la muerte por un león de montaña.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de su fuga, Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane", reaparece cuando envía por correo electrónico un inquietante video de amenaza de muerte al padre de una de sus novias.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston se vuelve más decidido que nunca a localizar a Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane," después de descubrir que ha secuestrado a su ex esposa, Gloria.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young man faces life in prison – and possibly worse – unless Horatio can prove his innocence against insurmountable odds.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team race against time to find out who is trying to frame Horatio for the murder of a woman he’s been dating.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a "wives weekend" ends in murder, the CSI team is faced with three women whose separate trysts with the victim make them prime suspects

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team works in tandem with NY CSI chief Mac Taylor to apprehend a serial killer before he kills the young girl he has just taken hostage

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ryan Wolfe is attacked and seriously injured while investigating the murder of a distraught soon-to-be ex-wife, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must rely on a video game for their next clue as to where a group of young gunmen will strike next.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team is hard-pressed to find the killer of an infamous drug lord, and a member of the team is investigated for drugs by Internal Affairs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A rapist is brutally murdered after his identity is exposed. Horatio and the CSI team are called in to investigate the murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a group of male “pickup artists” out to score when one of them unexpectedly turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s Latin Festival shifts from Samba to somber when a crowded dance floor becomes the scene of a gang member. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s longtime criminal nemesis Walter Resden surfaces once again, and Caine is determined to finally bring him to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: What begins as a case of apparent Road Rage leads the CSI team to the investigation of a stolen $4 million necklace, which is tied to a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el asesino de la esposa de Horatio se fuga de la cárcel y causa disturbios, deben determinar qué es lo que busca y encontrarlo antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una estrella de telerrealidad, el equipo de CSI investiga al elenco, a los admiradores obsesionados y el pasado oculto de las estrellas para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre afirma haber soñado con un asesinato antes de que sucediera, Horatio debe enviar a Natalia de incógnito para que el equipo determine la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando explota una refinería de azúcar, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI hacen un descubrimiento impactante sobre uno de los empleados de la fábrica.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un pescador escapa por poco de la muerte, el equipo de CSI tiene que esquivar las balas para mantenerlo con vida y descubrir quién lo persigue.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer embarazada es agredida, Horatio y el equipo luchan por ella y la vida de su bebé mientras rastrean a su atacante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la investigación de un millonario muerto lleva al equipo de CSI a un servicio de citas de elite, Ryan se hace pasar por un empresario para exponer las mentiras del casamentero.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el agua de una boca de incendios se lleva toda la evidencia de la escena del crimen, el equipo de CSI debe recrear un doble asesinato muy extraño.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en un partido de roller derby, lo único más corto que las faldas de las chicas es su paciencia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami arde en crímenes y caos cuando Memmo Fiero, el asesino de la esposa de Horatio Caine, regresa para tomar el control de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI tratan de descubrir cuál de los nerdos se vengó cuando un bravucón de la escuela secundaria murió apedreado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer escapa por poco de la muerte a manos de un asesino en serie, Horatio hará cualquier cosa para rastrear al psicópata.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren un club de caza exclusivo donde la presa es humana, el juego más peligroso de todos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un chofer de camión de reparto y un ama de casa de su ruta son asesinados, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI intentan encontrar una conexión.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Danny, and Flack investigate the death of a medical intern and an illegal organ trafficking ring at New York hospital.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A patient from a mental hospital, who masquerades as Superman, is found dead in an alleyway The CSIs retrace his steps to restore justice to the city.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When an anonymous caller tells Mac there is a dead body buried at Giant’s Stadium, evidence found at the scene points to one of the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a limo driver at a Kid Rock concert. With Kid as a leading suspect, the CSIs find themselves backstage.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young woman, dressed as a mermaid, is discovered floating in a bed of kelp. The CSIs search Manhattan for her murderer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A marine is found dead in Central Park. Across town, the team investigates the death of a woman found in a burned out car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a security guard is stabbed to death, Mac and Flack rush to the scene. While investigating the murder, a bomb is detonated.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two bungee jumpers witness a death on the Brooklyn Bridge, Mac and his new love interest Peyton Driscoll are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Holly Golightly look-alikes rob a jewelry store the detectives find themselves questioning the girls’ involvement in the world of blood diamonds.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay investigate the death of a vodka spokeswoman dressed as an ice queen, and murdered with her scepter at a promotional event.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial murderer leaves his victims in coded t-shirts. The team struggles to decode his mythological clues and put their main suspect behind bars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay explore the worlds of goth and glam when a young girl that belongs to the underground “suicide girls” cult is found dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young hotel employee falls to her death from a hotel rooftop after she becomes embroiled in a deal with a scheming top model.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac is summoned from a night at the opera to a bloody crime scene. Across town, a famous bachelor is found dead in his swim gym.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Jaula (S7 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerto a un promotor de un club español, el detective Mac Taylor debe enfrentar al jefe del laboratorio de criminalística de Barcelona para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Fiesta bajo el agua (S7 Ep13)
programme.desc: Cuando un camión articulado que lleva invitados a una fiesta termina misteriosamente en el fondo del río Hudson, el equipo de CSI debe exhumar los restos empapados.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Criminal con estilo (S7 Ep14)
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI rastrea a un asesino a sueldo afable y encantador, su investigación descubre una conspiración de consecuencias de gran alcance.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Justiciera (S7 Ep15)
programme.desc: Cuando un violador en serie es asesinado e inmovilizado de la misma manera que sus víctimas, el equipo de CSI sopesa el sentido de la justicia frente a su sentido del deber.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El intocable (S7 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una mujer obsesionada con conspiraciones, el equipo de CSI investiga y descubre que algunas de sus teorías pueden haber tenido algo de verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Hacer o morir (S7 Ep17)
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un alumno popular en la escuela privada más elitista de Manhattan, el equipo de CSI se encuentra en el competitivo mundo de los más privilegiados.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Crisis de identidad (S7 Ep18)
programme.desc: Jo equilibra los desafíos personales y profesionales cuando su hija adoptiva, Ellie, es la testigo clave en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Comida con sentimiento (S7 Ep19)
programme.desc: El equipo entra en el competitivo mundo de los camiones de comida gourmet cuando uno explota en un festival de comida de SoHo mientras Hawkes está ahí con su novia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Nada a cambio (S7 Ep20)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una mujer como obra de un asesino en serie. Mac vuelve a ponerse en contacto con su primer compañero después de que un ex convicto empieza a acosarlo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cadena perpetua (S7 Ep21)

programme.title: 18if
programme.desc: Haruto meets a girl who entered the dreamscape after an attempted suicide and became trapped in the world of her favorite anime.

programme.title: 18if

programme.title: Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest
programme.desc: When bullied high schooler Hajime Nagumo and his classmates are transported to a fantasy world, they discover they have various magical abilities.

programme.title: Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest
programme.desc: While his classmates deal with his absence, Hajime finds someone deep inside the labyrinth.

programme.title: Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest

programme.title: Akiba's Trip: The Animation

programme.title: Hyperdimension Neptunia

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Bruce Miller fue asesinado a tiros en la oficina del negocio de depósito de chatarra que poseía. La escena del crimen estaba casi inmaculada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros en su tienda solo un día antes de testificar contra el hombre acusado de robarla.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los sobrevivientes de las atrocidades nazis reconocieron al arzobispo Trifa, exjefe de la Iglesia Ortodoxa Rumana en los Estados Unidos, por haber dirigido un sangriento ataque contra los judíos durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Lleno de humo
programme.desc: Cuando una pareja de ancianos murió en un sospechoso incendio en casa, su hijo se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre, lo que hablaba del horror del crimen: el asesinato de dos niños pequeños y el apuñalamiento de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Quién fue el delincuente sexual que asesinó a dos muchachos adolescentes en Nebraska? La clave para detenerlo sería la composición única de la cuerda basura que usó para amarrar a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se sospecha un juego sucio cuando Glenda Furch, una trabajadora de una fábrica de Fort Worth, desaparece después de completar su turno.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Honaker fue declarado culpable de violación, sodomía y agresión sexual agraviada y condenado a tres cadenas perpetuas en prisión. El sostuvo su inocencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cirujano es apuñalado hasta la muerte y el sospechoso más probable es visto en un restaurante al momento del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cabecera
programme.desc: Cuando los cazadores encontraron un cráneo en un cañón de Texas, la policía encontró trozos de ropa, huesos pequeños y un mechón de cabello.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía de Seattle no tenía sospechosos en el violento asesinato de la cantante post-grunge, Mia Zapata.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Este episodio documenta un atentado mortal en una iglesia en Oakwood, Illinois, en diciembre de 1997.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un policía retirado es descubierto en su cama, muerto de una sola herida de bala en la cabeza. Su esposa primero dice que el motivo fue un robo; luego le dice a la policía que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, de 19 años, fue condenada por apuñalar a su madre, Barbara Mullenix, en el 2006. Supuestamente cargó el cuerpo sangriento de su madre en una caja de cartón antes de tirarla en Newport Bay, en California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un vecino vio cómo un hombre apuñalaba a su esposa, la empujaba a la piscina y le metía la cabeza bajo el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trago de pecados
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva a un trío de asesinatos sin resolver que ocurrieron en Wichita Falls, Texas durante la década de 1980, detalla cómo un cuarto asesinato durante el mismo período le proporcionó a la policía más de lo que se dieron cuenta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un auto en una zanja de drenaje con dos cuerpos adentro, una punta de un dedo de un guante de látex encontrada en la escena del crimen apuntaría a los investigadores hacia el asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Parece que una mujer ha perdido el control de su camioneta SUV y ha caído en el barranco de un arroyo poco profundo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el estreno de la serie Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia, una asistente de vuelo de Connecticut desaparece. La policía sospecha que su esposo es culpable de asesinato, pero ¿pueden comprobarlo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es apuñalada más de 100 veces. El asesino deja atrás el ADN, pero los investigadores deben jugar al gato y al ratón para obtener el ADN de un sospechoso que coincida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un brutal ataque a dos niños cerca de un estanque se basa en pruebas extraídas de las aguas turbias. Fue el primer caso en el que se utilizó evidencia de Diatomea (algas) para ubicar a un sospechoso en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The final day of training camp has everyone nervous because Kelli and Judy might take a squad of less than 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This season 400 hundred girls that have dared to dream they can become a world-famous Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, put it all on the line, as preliminary auditions for the 2015-2016 season begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Talent and looks alone won't get you on the squad. Dreams are made and hopes are crushed as only 46 out of 59 candidates make it into Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As Training Camp starts Kelli lays down the law. Girls start to crack as the reality of how hard it is to become a DCC sets in. Melissa Rycroft offers hope and advice on how to make it through.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy must cut 10 girls to get to the magic number of 36 for the squad. Uniform Fittings gives Kelli a better idea of who has the whole package. As the cuts begin so does emotional end of dreams.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the girls get the DCC look, it helps some and not others. Two surprise guests stop by rehearsal and rock the DCC's world. Kelli has one of the most awkward office visits of all time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Cameos and Show Group auditions push the new girls and vets to their limits. Melissa Rycroft tries to save a DCC that's hanging by a thread and there is a shocking outcome from a Kelli office visit.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emotions are supercharged as Kelli & Judy make a lot of tough cuts to keep up the quality of the team. Melissa Rycroft offers invaluable field experience.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli finally announces the squad. Injuries threaten the opening of Cowboys training camp. Game Day chaos endangers a flawless performance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented hopefuls arrive to try out for the best cheerleading team in the world, while many of the returning girls are looking for redemption. New judges increase the pressure of moving on to Finals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Veterans fight for their jobs as new girls try to live their dreams and make DCC Training Camp. Standing in their way is; panel Interviews, solos, an exhausting dance combination and a room full of very tough judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The new candidates' eyes are opened as they get a taste of what it is to be a DCC. As girls struggle to learn the dances, the reality of being "Big Time", sets in. Melissa Rycroft meets the new girls for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit. Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship. Extra stress is added on Makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up. The girls better start looking good because uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show are on the agenda. Surprises continue when two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves, stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko. Kitty Carter rocks a few of the candidate's worlds. Cameos give Kelli & Judy a fresh perspective on the girls. At Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp is coming to an end. Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake. Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Squad announcement is bittersweet as some favorites go home. The team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting. Game Day is when dreams come true!

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: Five kids from different worlds are stuck in a room -- on a Saturday! When Raditch introduces Saturday detention, Sean, Ellie, Hazel, Jimmy and Toby are the first inductees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Just when Terri thought she’d gotten over her ex boyfriend, Rick, he makes a concerted effort to win back her affections. She and her friends are wary – after all, leopards can’t change their spots.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s determined that he and the guys will be the “Last Band Standing” at Degrassi’s battle of the bands and win a spot on the show. So he sets the guys a fierce practice schedule and starts to write a killer new song.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year-end Junior Formal is fast approaching, and Marco is in charge, except when it comes to a date. Problem is, Marco’s too nervous to ask Dylan out at all, let alone ask him to the prom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A stressed-out Paige and Spinner decide they need a break and skip school for the day. Ashley, meanwhile, is in the doldrums, too “sick” to go to school. So when Ashley calls Paige to get her homework, Paige decides Ash needs to join them in a little fun.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Once again, as things finally start to come together for Sean, the other shoe drops - his brother and guardian, Tracker, has found a new job in Alberta. Sean thinks his life is over until he finds out that he can legally live on his own.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year end semi-formal is only hours away and Marco has transformed the gym into an idealized Bombay. It promises to be an amazing event, except Marco’s theme is causing tension between him and Ellie. Ellie finds the whole idea racist

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In her quest to repay Spinner for damage to his car, Alpha Paige has gone all beta. Suddenly, Spin’s using his new-found powers to zap whatever self-confidence Paige has left.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Land of Giants: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Witness the spectacle of the fearsome predator Giganotosaurus.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: The Doctor and archaeologists discover the city of Telos isn't as dead as they assumed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: Trapped in the tombs, the Cybermen release their poisonous pets, Cybermats.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: How will the Doctor rid Telos of Cybermen once and for all?

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: The TARDIS arrives on 21st Century Earth where all long-distance journeys are made instantaneously by T-Mat. But aliens have invaded the T-Mat relay station on the Moon...

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: With the commerce of the world grinding to a halt, the Doctor, Jamie, and Zoe agree to investigate and set off for the Moon in an old fashioned rocket.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: On the Moon, the Doctor is captured by the Ice Warriors and learns that they intend to use T-Mat to spread a deadly fungus across the world.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: As the Martian fungus begins to spread, Zoe, Jamie, and Gia Kelly attempt to strike back against Slaar and his occupying force of Ice Warriors.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: An Ice Warrior invasion fleet is on its way to the Moon. Back on Earth, the Doctor devises a plan to destroy the Martian fungus.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: Returning to the Moonbase, the Doctor confronts Slaar and the remaining Ice Warriors and must find a way of deflecting the invasion fleet that is heading towards them.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The TARDIS arrives in no man’s land during World War I. Rescued from the Germans, the travellers are put on trial by the British General Smythe who is not all he seems.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: Finding evidence of alien technology in Smythe’s office, the Doctor, Jamie, and Zoe make their escape in Lady Jennifer’s ambulance, but Smythe gives orders to have them killed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that they are on an alien planet divided into different time zones where human soldiers fight never-ending wars.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor and Zoe penetrate the Aliens' HQ from where the war games are controlled. Carstairs is reconditioned and exposes the Doctor and Zoe as German spies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: In the American Civil War zone, Jamie and Lady Jennifer join forces with resistance fighters from various time zones and prepare to launch an attack on Central Control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor sends Zoe to the war zones to assemble a resistance force. The Doctor remains in Central Control to steal the processing machine, but the War Chief is one step ahead.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor, Jamie, and Carstairs have escaped back to the 1917 war zone, but General Smythe is waiting for them and opens fire on them with a machine gun.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the War Chief who belongs to the same race of people as the Doctor and offers an alliance. In the 1917 zone fighters prepare to attack Central Control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The rebels seize control of the Aliens' HQ but the Doctor is forced to send a call for help to his own people, the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The war games are over and the Doctor is put on trial by the Time Lords for breaking the laws of time.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: The TARDIS takes the newly regenerated Doctor to Earth to begin his exile. Brigadier Lethbridge-Stewart leads a UNIT investigation into a mysterious meteorite shower.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: A recovered Doctor escapes the hospital and joins UNIT in their investigation. Meanwhile, Channing directs one of his Auton servants to recover a meteorite.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: Sam Seeley has found one of the meteorites but the Autons want it back and are closing in. General Scobie visits Auto Plastics, playing into the hands of Channing.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: The invasion begins as Auton shop dummies come to life and attack the public. The Doctor and UNIT infiltrate Auto Plastics where the Doctor faces the Nestene consciousness.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: UNIT is at a project run by Professor Stahlman who intends to penetrate Earth’s crust. But the drilling has already released something deadly from beneath the Earth’s surface.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: The green slime oozing from the drill head is transforming men into monsters. Stahlman refuses to listen to the warnings and resorts to sabotage so that his project may continue.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: Transported to a parallel world, the Doctor discovers that England is under military rule and the drilling project is at a more advanced stage.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: In the parallel world, the drilling project is about to penetrate the Earth’s crust. The Doctor, arrested as a spy, is unable to convince his captors of the danger that faces them.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull/chow mix has an extreme fear of the stove; a Rottweiler and a German shepherd battle for control; a Jack Russell terrier cannot handle the loss of its pack leader.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A family's new Great Dane moves in on its other dog's territory; Cesar helps Los Angeles' animal-control department with its new pet-ownership program.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: TV personality Ed McMahon has an aggressive wheaten terrier; a beagle does not leave the house; an Australian shepherd is so territorial no one has visited his home in years.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A widow's retriever mix and two fox terriers do not get along; a Shar-Pei/Doberman mix drools excessively on car rides; Cesar revisits a Rottweiler mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: After a 45-day stint in Iraq and two hurricanes, an explosive-sniffing ATF Labrador retriever begins exhibiting severe symptoms of terror.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan helps an overly aggressive German shepherd and a timid rat terrier.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help bring peace to Jennifer Lee Pryor's home, where fights have been breaking out among foster dogs and her own four dogs; an aggressive beagle.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier who became aggressive after going blind; a spoiled Pekingese/miniature poodle mix; a Rottweiler with a dangerous obsession with the horses on the ranch where she lives.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Lab-greyhound mix has aggression problems; a Rhodesian Ridgeback-boxer mix has severe dog aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier barks too much; a once-shy German shepherd becomes aggressive; a shepherd mix has a whining problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help an aggressive Shiba Inu from Japan and meets a wire fox terrier who has a fixation with a riding lawn-mower.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived, the only question is whom?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known" addresses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today, and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sarah makes a dress for Krystina identical to one worn by her own little girl; concerned over his irrational behavior, Blake hires a private investigator to follow Adam, as his self-destructive quest leads toward disaster.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven struggles with his love for Sammy Jo and his homosexuality; despite being warned of Dirk Maurier's questionable business practices, Alexis agrees to a partnership; Leslie and Clay's romance leads to passion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Blake wait helplessly as the police search for Sarah and Krystina; Adam tips Neal McVane to a stock buyout by Alexis and Dirk Maurier; Nick Kimball celebrates his recent good fortune with a marriage proposal to Dominique.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina and Krystle are reunited, as Sarah is placed under private psychiatric care; Adam confesses his true identity to Blake and Alexis; following a visit to his mother's grave, Adam returns to Dana and pleads for her forgiveness.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake is stunned to learn that Clay may be Ben's son; Jackie's attempt to reunite Dominique and Garrett fails; Sarah accepts her baby's death after witnessing the gravesite; Clay tells Leslie of their possible blood ties.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle is followed by a mysterious stranger, Clay and Ben plan to leave Denver following the inconclusive blood test to determine Clay's real father; Blake and Alexis show their love for Adam by adopting him legally.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Matthew Blaisdel threatens to kill Blake to ensure Krystle's cooperation; Alexis is saved from certain death by a mysterious and handsome stranger, unaware of their family's horrifying experiences.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The incident in the bunkhouse leaves Steven emotionally scarred. The police urge him to seek psychiatric help to deal with the trauma. Jeff and Fallon's unexpected homecoming helps everyone to put the tragedy behind them.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.desc: In this episode of Aging in the Wild, we explore the physiological secrets and factors that determine life expectancy in various animal species.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Hunting has been a long-standing cultural tradition in the North Eastern India for long. But with the shirking of the forests and endangering of the wildlife, hunting has become unsustainable.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: It’s back to the future as Te Radar visits Houston, Texas – the birthplace of American oil - to see how the DeLorean made famous by Michael J Fox has been rescued from the scrap heap and is now leading the way in cool electric transport.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks bordering on South Africa and extending into neighbouring countries. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect.

programme.title: Disruptive Nature
programme.desc: 2016 Central Italy Earthquake; this annihilating earthquake hit Central Italy in August 2016. 2017 South Asia Floods; heavy monsoon rains caused the worst floods in South Asia's history.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Episode 1

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: Bruce is still working on the meat from the cow's head meat, making biltong from pieces and hanging it up, and the rest gets put into the stew.

programme.title: The Forgotten Forests Of Malaysia
programme.desc: Malaysia boasts some of the most ancient forests on the planet. These are biological treasure troves; home to an unparalleled wealth of life.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, we catch up with cub Coll after he was rushed to the vet last week. Whenever cheetah outreach is asked for a public appearance, Joe is the natural choice, but even super stars have off days.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Europe

programme.title: Wildest Indochina
programme.desc: Cambodia is one of the most bio diverse countries in southeast Asia, whose wildlife and climate is ruled by the monsoon cycle. It is a wild land of extreme rains, raging rivers and flooding lakes that create great challenges for its animals.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: This city spends most of the year encased in ice…but when summer hits, Anchorage bursts into life. Animals and plants living this far north have been forced to adapt, working faster to make the most of the short season.

programme.title: On The Trails Of The Glaciers
programme.desc: Mission to Alaska

programme.title: Asia - Secret Lives, Hidden Places
programme.desc: On the top of a smoking volcano, on the southern island of Kyushu in Japan, a Shinto priest performs rights that keep his community safe. 200 years ago his town was completely destroyed. The last eruption here was in 1991.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina continues her stay at the Hide Safari Camp with Sean. Cecil's pride is still in the area scouting for prey. Sean teaches Kristina about elephant anatomy and wild dogs take down an impala and mate right outside camp.

programme.title: Antarctica
programme.desc: For the first time in history the mysterious icy expanse of the highest, driest and coldest continent has been captured in the giant screen format. Experience the life and drama of Antarctica like never before.

programme.title: The Last Reef
programme.desc: The Last Reef is an uplifting, inspirational experience capturing one of nature's more vibrant and diverse wonderlands. These biodiversity hot spots are as vital to our lives as the rainforests.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Nicole and Jess investigate the circumstances surrounding a man with a gunshot wound to the head and found in the trunk of a car.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: A newcomer to Atlanta carries out a nefarious plan; Stephanie deals from the bottom of the deck to get what she wants.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie is a force to be reckoned with at a Women's Empowerment Summit; Bella forges an alliance with Rod.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie makes an accusation and vows to get revenge; Bella navigates Rod and Evan; Amara forms an unlikely partnership that compels Titus to make questionable moves.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie and Irene conspire against Rondell; Titus takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie finds a way to keep her enemies at bay; the highly anticipated anniversary celebration at Thelma's Place ends sooner than expected.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: The Barnes have a big surprise for the Carlisles, forcing Stephanie and Evan to fight fire with fire; Amara receives backlash at work for her prior indiscretions.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie plays the ultimate trump card with Amara; Bella takes another chance on love, only to wake up to a nightmare; Rondell and Evan are blind-sided.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cassie catches up with an old friend; Cam and Reggie visit a school; Missy and Allison each receive some unsolicited advice.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Missy pressures Reggie to make a play for their independence; M-Chuck's satisfaction comes at the cost of Cassie's; Cam rebuffs Flaherty.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Newly signed basketball star Cam Calloway is embraced by the city of Atlanta, but an entourage consisting of family members proves to be a liability.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam's mother shares too much information while attending a charity event; Uncle Julius wants to be Cam's "talent scout."

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam gets an unexpected wish from a dying teenager; Reggie wants Cam to pay for the family's expenses.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Complications arise when Missy works to get Reggie into an exclusive country club; a church pastor does not approve of Cam's sister or her lifestyle.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam and Reggie reunite with a childhood friend whose basketball dreams were derailed by a stint in prison; Cassie looks for houses; Cam is offered a shoe endorsement deal.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam intervenes when a former girlfriend tries to reconnect with Reggie; Cam and Reggie must decide between multiple shoe endorsement deals.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: The Calloways upgrade to a spacious new mansion; team owner Jimmy Flaherty attaches serious strings to Cam's max deal.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory resents Elyse for the advice she gives her pregnant friend.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants fall out of a speeding helicopter. Contestant must consume 10 live slugs and a shot of cow bile. Each contestant must cross between two buildings by placing three planks in front of them on top of two tight ropes as they walk.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be placed on a 20 foot rope ladder. Contestants play a game to determine quantity of food they will have to eat. Contestant must walk across a 12 inch wide and 60 foot long beam suspended 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt, the contestant will be placed on a 30 foot truss structure. Contestant moves electric eels from one side of tank to the other. In this stunt, the contestant will be seated on a barrel hung by 20 foot long cables underneath a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed in a plexiglass cabinet. One person retrieves roaches using only their mouth and transfers it to their partner's mouth, who in turn drops it into another bin. In this stunt, it will be a husband and wife team.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants stand in front of a long table with 13 holes. Contestant enters a cylindrical glass tank filled with water and then dead frozen mice are dumped in. The contestant will be standing on a large plexiglass platform in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Joe Rogan, in a crowd of fans, counts down the top 15 stunts from all the shows up till this point.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants hold onto monkey bars, suspended under a helicopter. In a Plexiglas coffin and covered with leeches. Contestants search for rubber boots at the bottom of a tank of cut up fish parts. Contestants must run their motorcycles off of a cliff.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start on the roof of The Mandalay Bay. A tank is filled with Piranha and pig kidneys, which will need to be picked up off using their mouth. The contestants are allowed to eat up to six cave spiders.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Taxi cabs will each be suspended from their own crane. Player is placed inside a sealed Plexiglas coffin with thousands of roaches. The contestants will be hung by their ankles from a crane and suspended over a swimming pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant seated in the helicopter will "go" they crawl out and under the helicopter. Players transfer cow hooves out of a tank of Cod Liver Oil and into a tank of Maggots. Contestant must drive their car at approx. 25mph towards another car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start this game floating in the water. Contestants compress a cows eye with their mouth, squeezing the juice out of the eye into a glass. Contestant will stand on Euclid dump trucks as they travel down the road.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Players are placed into a large plexiglas coffin with several thousand snakes. Eight glass torch-goblets are placed on stone pillars of varying heights. Contestants will bob in a tank filled with cow eyes to recover pig hearts.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must dive into the water and swim down to a city bus. On a table, there are dishes of roaches. Players are given fifty cow brains with a FF chip hidden inside. Contestants must make the way across a maze of beams.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark take on a system that keeps inmate mothers and their children apart.

programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.desc: The Angels help a busy, all-American family when a crisis threatens to tear it apart.

programme.desc: Ricky is a gas station attendant who just lost his job. Monica goes to help with the closing inventory, and to convince him that a door closing opens another door and he needs to pursue his poetry.
